subcodes.first_line: O servant! Bear thou witness within thyself, then within thine essence, then within thy spirit, that verily there is no God but Him, the Single, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد فاشهد فی نفسک ثم فی ذاتک ثم فی روحک بانه لا اله الا هو الفرد الصمد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @symbolism
